name: Boots of Speed
overview: These magical boots grant temporary speed enhancement when activated.

properties.activation: While you wear these boots, you can take a Bonus Action to click the boots' heels together.
properties.effect: If you do, the boots double your Speed, and any creature that makes an Opportunity Attack against you has Disadvantage on the attack roll.
properties.deactivation: If you click your heels together again, you end the effect.
properties.duration_limit: When you've used the boots' property for a total of 10 minutes, the magic ceases to function for you until you finish a Long Rest.
